mapper.sql: select id, question, sql_text, datasource_id, domain_tags, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_at from bi_fewshot_example
mapper.select: where enabled = 1 and (datasource_id IS NULL OR datasource_id = #{datasourceId}) order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into bi_fewshot_example (question, sql_text, datasource_id, domain_tags, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_at) values (#{question}, #{sqlText}, #{datasourceId}, #{domainTags}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: update bi_fewshot_example set enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
